golden_categories.name: Basic Email Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating standard email formats and basic rules.

golden_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain-specific rules.

golden_categories.name: Underscore in Domain
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with underscores allowed in the domain.

golden_categories.name: UTF8 Local Part Restriction
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses without UTF8 characters in the local part.

golden_categories.name: Display Name Support
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with optional display names.

golden_categories.name: Required Display Name
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with mandatory display names.

golden_categories.name: IP Domain Validation
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with IPs allowed as domains.

golden_categories.name: Blacklisted Characters
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with restrictions on specific characters in the name.

golden_categories.name: Max Length Restriction
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length restrictions.

golden_categories.name: Ignore Max Length
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with maximum length ignored.

golden_categories.name: Blacklisted Domains
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with denylisted domains.

golden_categories.name: Blacklist with Regular Expressions
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain blacklist using regular expressions.

golden_categories.name: Whitelisted Domains
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with allowed domains.

golden_categories.name: Whitelist with Regular Expressions
golden_categories.description: Tests for validating email addresses with domain whitelist using regular expressions.

generated_categories.name: Display Name Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers cases related to the validation of display names, including allowing, requiring, and handling edge cases like trailing spaces or improper escaping.

generated_categories.name: Maximum Length Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures emails exceeding the maximum length are rejected unless the `ignore_max_length` option is enabled.

generated_categories.name: Host Validation
generated_categories.description: Validates emails against host-specific rules, including blacklists and whitelists.

generated_categories.name: Domain-Specific Validation
generated_categories.description: Covers rules specific to certain domains, such as Gmail, including username constraints and byte length validation.

generated_categories.name: Domain Format Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures domains are valid FQDNs or IPs based on configuration options.

generated_categories.name: Blacklisted Character Validation
generated_categories.description: Ensures emails with blacklisted characters in the local part are rejected.

generated_categories.name: Local Part Validation
generated_categories.description: Validates the local part of the email, including quoted and unquoted formats, with and without UTF-8 support.

golden_to_generated.reason: GENC-7 covers validation of the local part of an email, which partially overlaps with basic email validation in GC-1.
GENC-4 explicitly addresses domain-specific validation, which directly aligns with GC-2.
No generated category specifically addresses validation of underscores in the domain.
GENC-7 includes validation of the local part, which partially overlaps with UTF8 local part restrictions in GC-4.
GENC-1 explicitly addresses validation of display names, which aligns with GC-5.
GENC-1 includes validation of required display names, which directly aligns with GC-6.
GENC-5 explicitly addresses validation of IP domains, which aligns with GC-7.
GENC-6 explicitly addresses validation of blacklisted characters, which aligns with GC-8.
GENC-2 explicitly addresses maximum length restrictions, which aligns with GC-9.
GENC-2 explicitly addresses ignoring maximum length restrictions, which aligns with GC-10.
GENC-3 includes host blacklist validation, which partially overlaps with blacklisted domains in GC-11.
GENC-3 includes host blacklist validation, which partially overlaps with blacklist using regular expressions in GC-12.
GENC-3 includes host whitelist validation, which partially overlaps with whitelisted domains in GC-13.
GENC-3 includes host whitelist validation, which partially overlaps with whitelist using regular expressions in GC-14.

generated_to_golden.reason: GENC-1 covers display name validation, which aligns with GC-5 and GC-6.
GENC-2 covers maximum length validation, which aligns with GC-9 and GC-10.
GENC-3 covers host-specific validation, which partially overlaps with GC-11, GC-12, GC-13, and GC-14.
GENC-4 explicitly addresses domain-specific validation, which aligns with GC-2.
GENC-5 explicitly addresses domain format validation, which aligns with GC-7.
GENC-6 explicitly addresses blacklisted character validation, which aligns with GC-8.
GENC-7 covers local part validation, which partially overlaps with GC-1 and GC-4.
